creator: michaelo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gleb Popov from comment #19)

lang/gcc* has Fortran on by default, I'd expect lang/llvm to do the same. I'd love to test our huge Fortran codebase against flang with CMake is ready. For now I am limited to HP Fortran on HP-UX and GCC on Windows + FreeBSD.
